# Support

Use the right GitHub channel so requests are easy to track.

## Bugs

Open a bug report with the issue template:

https://github.com/yowainwright/diu/issues/new/choose

Include the DIU version, macOS version, install method, exact command, expected behavior, and actual behavior.

## Feature Requests

Open a feature request with the issue template:

https://github.com/yowainwright/diu/issues/new/choose

For broad design discussion, use GitHub Discussions:

https://github.com/yowainwright/diu/discussions

## Security

Do not file public issues for vulnerabilities. Follow `SECURITY.md`.
